rulings.Case Title: DAVID SHARPE VS. B.R. FUNSTEN & COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 23, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Communication and Power Industries¿ demurrer to the first, second, third, fourth, fifth, eleventh, twelfth, thirteenth, fourteenth and fifteenth causes of action of plaintiffs¿ first amended complaint is overruled as untimely. Pursuant to C.C.P. sections 1005(b) and 1010.6, defendant was required to provide notice by October 27. Defendant¿s proof of service demonstrates that defendant did not provide notice until October 28. Plaintiffs¿ request to consider its late opposition is denied. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M. MCRAY et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 23, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Hardie-Tynes Co., Inc.¿s general demurrer to the entire first amended complaint and special demurrers to the first, second, third and fourth causes of action are sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
